title: European gas surges higher as Russia gas flows continue to fall
section_path: European gas surges higher as Russia gas flows continue to fall
section_path_text: European gas surges higher as Russia gas flows continue to fall
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Mounting growth concerns weigh on commodity markets, with metals leading the complex lower. Energy managed to buck the trend with supply side issues pushing prices higher. Image reference: 1652392391082.png | assets/2022-05-13_european-gas-surges-higher-as-russia-gas-flows-continue-to-fall_img_1652392391082_dff41ed4c03b.png
Crude oil ended the session higher following another rollercoaster ride.
